prompt: A high-fashion studio sports campaign image of a tall athletic female tennis player standing powerfully in front of an enormous black sans-serif word FOCUS that fills almost the entire white background from edge to edge. She is centered and posed confidently with one leg straight and the other bent, her left foot resting on the throat of an oversized upright tennis racket placed on the glossy court floor. She wears a clean all-white tennis outfit: fitted sleeveless V-neck performance top, short pleated tennis skirt, white crew socks with a small black P logo, white wristbands, and white tennis shoes. Her skin has a luminous editorial sheen, her body is toned and elongated, and her dark hair is pulled back into a sleek low ponytail. Create a luxury athletic ad aesthetic with dramatic but soft studio lighting, sharp contrast, minimal color palette, and polished reflections on the black glossy court surface. Include exactly 5 white tennis balls scattered across the floor in the foreground and midground, each marked with the same small black letter logo. The racket is white with a modern frame and visible strings, leaning slightly toward camera. Composition is symmetrical and bold, with the giant typography behind the model acting as a graphic backdrop, editorial fashion photography, premium sports branding, ultra-clean retouching, full-body shot, straight-on camera, square crop.
